creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text: I didn't open the bug, so I don't know if it is a build failure or not. Technically this port, php-composer2, doesn't have a build process since it is just a PHP script. The error as far as I've been told has to do more with the weird combination of PHP and MySQL 8.0 and it making the OpenSSL extension a problem. If Sean could post logs of what they were seeing without the hacks in place, that would help.
